modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have excessive unnecessary detail and show strong technical proficiency. There should be no spelling errors and some contradictory ordering.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Error saving edited PDF after deleting a page in Adobe Acrobat.

full_description_text: So, the user was working on a PDF in Adobe Acrobat XI on their Windows 10 machine, right? They opened up the document, deleted a page, and then when they tried to save it, bam! They hit this error message saying something about resources not existing or lacking permissions. It’s a bit frustrating because they were just trying to make a simple edit, and now they’re stuck with this annoying pop-up.
short_description: Error saving edited PDF after deleting a page in Adobe Acrobat.
